areas.name: AI, Technology & Innovation
areas.blurb: How economies adopt new technology, from AI to telecom, and what that means for productivity, labor, and growth.

areas.name: Macroeconomics & Growth
areas.blurb: Growth, debt, and macroeconomic resilience in the face of shocks.

areas.name: Development Economics
areas.blurb: Structural transformation, trade, and competition, with a focus on the Middle East and North Africa.

areas.name: Energy & Commodities
areas.blurb: Oil and commodity markets, energy transition, and subsidy reform.
